- **Recurring gaps:** Task formalization — commitments made in meetings are not being captured as trackable items. No daily reviews run, no weekly priorities set. The operational scaffolding around your work is missing.

## Communication Style
- **Formality:** Professional casual with very direct tendencies. You told BA/Simon "you fucked up" in a negotiation — no sugarcoating. You share personal career stories freely in interviews to build rapport.
- **Decision speed:** Fast on people decisions (30-min interviews, same-day feedback loops with George), slower on written deliverables (proposal writing, agreement review).
- **Feedback preference:** Challenging coaching style. You value radical candor and truth-seeking over diplomacy. You explicitly told candidates you hire for "detachment from being right in favor of truth-seeking."
